channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4636] Test failure on test suite conf-sanity, subtest test_50h client start failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for wangdi <di.wang@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f4de714c-9634-11e3-bc3b-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_50h failed with the following error:

client start failed

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == conf-sanity test 50h: LU-642: activate deactivated OST ===== 23:21:22 (1392448882)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl,flock shadow-7vm12@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
LustreError: 152-6: Ignoring deprecated mount option 'acl'.
Lustre: 25519:0:(client.c:1912:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1392448894/real 1392448894] req@ffff880072915c00 x1460087748036556/t0(0) o250->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 400/544 e 0 to 1 dl 1392448899 ref 1 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 12413:0:(client.c:1081:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) @@@ send limit expired req@ffff880072915800 x1460087748036560/t0(0) o101->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 328/344 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 2 fl Rpc:W/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 12422:0:(client.c:1081:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) @@@ send limit expired req@ffff880072915000 x1460087748036568/t0(0) o101->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 328/344 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 2 fl Rpc:W/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
Lustre: 25519:0:(client.c:1912:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1392448904/real 1392448904] req@ffff880072915c00 x1460087748036572/t0(0) o250->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 400/544 e 0 to 1 dl 1392448914 ref 1 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
Lustre: 25519:0:(client.c:1912:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1392448919/real 1392448919] req@ffff880072915400 x1460087748036576/t0(0) o250->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 400/544 e 0 to 1 dl 1392448934 ref 1 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 12413:0:(client.c:1081:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) @@@ send limit expired req@ffff880072915800 x1460087748036564/t0(0) o101->MGC10.1.4.79@tcp@10.1.4.79@tcp:26/25 lens 328/344 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 2 fl Rpc:W/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 15c-8: MGC10.1.4.79@tcp: The configuration from log 'lustre-client' failed (-5). This may be the result of communication errors between this node and the MGS, a bad configuration, or other errors. See the syslog for more information.
Lustre: Unmounted lustre-client
LustreError: 12413:0:(obd_mount.c:1326:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount (-5)

Info required for matching: conf-sanity 50h
item.summary: Test failure on test suite conf-sanity, subtest test_50h client start failed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.
